query: I am planning to hang delicate shirts as soon as the wash cycle ends, so I want the bathroom to be gently humid and the kitchen lit for sorting. At 10:33 AM, which is 9 minutes before the washer 1 in the utility room finishes, turn humidifier 1 on in the bathroom with the fan on a medium high setting and turn light 1 on in the kitchen
